use_cases: Selecting between pricing tiers or plan options in SaaS dashboards
Choosing feature configurations or add-ons during onboarding
Picking product variants or options in e-commerce checkout flows
Selecting account types or preferences in fintech applications
Picking delivery or shipping method options
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based radio group component that renders selectable option cards with titles, optional descriptions and icons. Features a pulsing green indicator dot for the selected state, hover shadow effects, and responsive grid layout. Built with accessibility in mind using Radix primitives for proper keyboard navigation and ARIA support.
